frontMatter.title: Android Arch's Room - Getting Started
frontMatter.summary: So, on the first post we already have an introduction or more like a sneak peek to Room data access object code. Let's get our hands dirty now!

prev.title: Android Arch's Room - Introduction
prev.summary: My first reaction when Android Architecture Component is out is just **meh..** I mean come on, the ViewModel is heavily tied to Activity and Fragment and basically i don't need it because i use Conductor…

next.title: Android Arch's Room - Relation
next.summary: On the previous post, we already discussed the basic Room from AAC (Android Architecture Component). In this post, we're gonna explore the how to create a relationship between tables
